meta.notes: Engine: Kling via kling_via_fal (fal-ai/kling-video/o3/pro/reference-to-video). Kling direct API returned HTTP 429 (code 1102: account balance not enough) on ALL clips — all character/empty/broll went via FAL fallback. Lipsync: LTX-2.3 via FAL (unchanged from run1). Asset acquisition, shot_script_gen, character_ref_gen, keyframe_gen reused from run1 (not re-timed). W1 agent hit stream idle timeout; clip_003 retried on main thread (+146s to wall time). Wall time covers video_gen_start onward only. Compare video gen phase directly against run1 Minimax.

test_input.name: APT. — ROSÉ & Bruno Mars (Apple Music 30s preview)
test_input.description: Reused from run1 — same 29.95s audio, same 9-clip shot script, same character_ref.jpg, same keyframes

task.name: music-video
task.purpose: Engine comparison run: Kling (kling_via_fal) vs run1 Minimax. Same 9-clip shot script, Kling i2v for character/empty/broll, LTX-2.3 for lipsync.
task.expected_output: A 29.95s 1080×1920 9:16 vertical mp4 with karaoke captions, delivered via CDN

asset_acquisition.notes: Reused from run1 (apple_music=3156ms, convert=411ms). Not re-timed in run2.

steps.name: shot_script_gen
steps.notes: Reused from run1 (35.3s). Same 9-clip shot script.

steps.name: audio_seg_extract
steps.notes: 3 lipsync audio segments re-extracted (same as run1).

steps.name: parallel_video_gen
steps.notes: 3 parallel workers. Kling direct API: 429 on ALL clips (code 1102 balance). All 6 character/empty/broll went via kling_via_fal (fal-ai/kling-video/o3/pro/reference-to-video). Per-clip Kling FAL times: clip_001 ~240s, clip_002 ~270s, clip_003 143.8s (main thread retry after W1 timeout), clip_005 224.5s, clip_007 214.5s, clip_008 259.0s. Lipsync: clip_004 50.4s, clip_006 51.8s, clip_009 56.3s. W1 agent hit stream idle timeout at ~571s; clip_003 retried on main thread.

steps.name: assembly
steps.notes: normalize: 17447ms (9 clips), concat: 178ms, audio_mix: 325ms. Output: raw_audio2.mp4 20976KB.

steps.name: captions
steps.notes: faster-whisper (small, CPU), karaoke style. Output: final2.mp4 41732KB.

execution.notes: wall_total - all_tool_calls = 977.2 - 924.8 = 52.4s LLM overhead (worker coordination, error handling messages).
